description_long: This stuffed toy is modeled after the character Dragonite, featuring a plump, rounded body covered in a soft, light orange fabric. Its belly is segmented with cream-colored horizontal stripes, and it has two small, teal-colored wings with yellow edges attached to its back. The toy's head is large and friendly, with big, expressive oval eyes, two short white antennae, and a small snout. Its arms are short and outstretched, ending in three white claws, while its legs are thick and sturdy, also tipped with white claws. The long, tapering tail extends behind, and the overall appearance is inviting and huggable, making it suitable for children or collectors.
description: A plush Dragonite stuffed toy with a soft orange body, cream-striped belly, teal wings, and a friendly face with antennae and claws.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, outstretched arms, cream-striped belly, and both wings clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, snout, one wing, and the long tail extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, both wings, and the full length of the tail.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, wing, and tail from the opposite side.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and neutral, with large, wide-open eyes and a small, closed mouth that gives a gentle and approachable appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms outstretched to the sides, legs slightly apart, and head facing forward.
